title: NewOresPlusReworked
description: This Mod Adds in Three different ores and Item of the materials, In tools and armor. And adds in some Recipes that are not in the base game.
body:
Welcome to NewOresPlusReworked, the Minecraft mod that transforms your adventure by expanding the world with powerful new resources! Dive into a richer, more challenging experience as this mod introduces a variety of new ores, each more formidable than Diamond's and Netherite that you're used to.

### **Key Features:** ### 

-  **New Ores:** Discover and mine new types of ores scattered throughout the Minecraft world. Each ore has unique properties and is essential for crafting the mod's advanced tools and weapons.

- **Enhanced Tools & Weapons:** Craft tools and weapons stronger than diamond and Netherite. With the Neworesplus mod, your gear will become more durable, efficient, and effective, making even the toughest battles and mining sessions more manageable.

- **Unique Abilities:** Many new tools and weapons come with special abilities and bonuses, offering strategic advantages and new gameplay mechanics. From enhanced durability to special effects, your new gear will give you the edge you need in your Minecraft adventures.

- **Crafting and Upgrades:** Utilize the new ores to create advanced crafting recipes and upgrade your existing equipment. The mod adds a fresh layer of progression and customization, allowing you to tailor your gear to your playstyle.

With Neworesplus, your Minecraft world just got a whole lot more exciting! Explore new depths, battle fiercer foes, and gear up with the most powerful tools and weapons the game has to offer. Embrace the challenge and elevate your gameplay to new heights with NewOresPlusReworked!


- **Ore Generation:** The ores will spawn at Y:+14, and at Y:-8, that includes the deepslate ore variant of that Ore. Plus New Ores that can be found in the Nether, or the End. For Nether ores, spawns at Y:48
